meta.title: EPN Workshop · Setup Guide
meta.description: Prepare for the Cursor workshop: install Cursor, create accounts, then open the template repository.

hero.description: Install Cursor, create your accounts, then open the template repository. Bring these ready and you can build and deploy during the session.

install.title: Install Cursor
install.description: Start by downloading the desktop app. This is the editor we will use for the whole workshop.
install.body: Download and install Cursor for your operating system. You can create your account in the next step if you need one.
steps: Download the installer for your machine.
Keep it ready for the workshop session.
install.imageAltDiff: Cursor 3 agent proposing code changes with inline diffs
install.imageAltAgents: Cursor 3 Agents Window with completed agent task and code review

accounts.title: Accounts you need
accounts.description: After installing Cursor, sign up for each service. Free plans are enough.

items.name: Cursor
items.purpose: Your AI-native code editor for the workshop.

items.name: GitHub
items.purpose: Host your project and fork the workshop template.

items.name: Vercel
items.purpose: Deploy your app from GitHub in a few clicks.

ready.title: You're ready
ready.description: Once Cursor is installed and your accounts are set, open the workshop repository and wait until we begin building the app.
